column1:
GEMS TARIFF FOR SERVICES BY NON-CONTRACTED DENTAL THERAPISTS WITH
EFFECT FROM 2026-01-01

column2:
In calculating the GEMS Tariff , the following rounding method is used: Values  R10 and below rounded to the nearest cent, R10+ rounded to the nearest 10cent. Modifier values are rounded to the nearest cent. When new item prices are calculated, e.g. when applying a modifier, the same rounding scheme should be followed.
ALL GEMS TARIFFS ARE VAT INCLUSIVE.
Item 001 refers to a Full Mouth Examination, charting and treatment planning and no further fee shall be chargeable until the treatment plan resulting from this consultation is completed.

It is recommended that, when such benefits are granted, drugs, consumables and disposable items used during a procedure or issued to a patient on discharge will only be reimbursed by a medical scheme if the appropriate code is supplied on the account.
Office/hospital visit – after regularly scheduled hours
Oral hygiene instruction - each additional visit
Administration of dermal filler within the peri-oral area.
Root planning-four or more teeth per quadrant
Root planning-one to three per quadrant
Extraction of tooth or exposed tooth roots
Cost of provisional splinting materials. See Rule 002 Appendix A.
Resin - four or more surfaces, posterior
Resin - four or more surfaces, anterior
Application of desensitising or caries arresting agent – per tooth
Application of desensitising medicament, per visit
Cost of device material to test implant stability.
